name: busytok-subagent-offloading
description: Route coding-agent subtasks through Busytok with explicit provider/model bindings and observable task lifecycles.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate coding subtasks through explicit Busytok model routes.
interface.longDescription: Provides a guarded workflow for catalog discovery, explicit provider/model binding, task polling, cancellation, and structured diagnostics through the Busytok CLI.
defaultPrompt: Use Busytok to delegate this bounded coding subtask.
Check the live Busytok catalog before routing this task.
Poll the delegated task and report its structured result.
